scripts.build: npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run build -w @gamepulse/api && npm run build -w @gamepulse/web && npm run build -w @gamepulse/userscript
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && concurrently -n api,worker,web "npm run dev -w @gamepulse/api" "npm run worker -w @gamepulse/api" "npm run dev -w @gamepulse/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/api && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/web
